objective: In `Iris/Std/HeapInstances.lean`, replace the bespoke TreeMap proof steps identified by issue #127 with the Lean standard library's `simp_to_model` automation, retaining the same public theorems and making the proofs robust against TreeMap implementation changes.
completion_criteria: The focused file and full Iris-Lean build must pass with unchanged theorem signatures; the diff should demonstrate that `simp_to_model` discharges the TreeMap model obligations rather than adding axioms or suppressing checks.
non_results: Finite computation outside its stated range is not a proof of a universal claim.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
Restating a known reduction, checking examples, or giving an unproved key lemma is not terminal success.

baseline_review.requirement: Audit exact statement/status, prior work, established facts, ruled-out routes, open leads, tools, and acceptance path before technical research.

synthesis_summary: Attempt retained without durable claim projection because its evidence receipt did not validate: The exact Lean PR compiler successfully discharged the standalone mergeWith simp_to_model proof. Exact Iris focused/full validation failed before HeapInstances or the independent checker because Iris #532 pins Lean/Qq/Batteries 4.32.1 while Lean #14526 is 4.34.0-pre. The verification contract is therefore unmet. The superseded generated v4.32 build cache was removed to satisfy storage reserves; its sources and immutable receipts remain, and it is reproducible from the saved scripts.

established_facts.claim: Pinned Lean v4.32.0 has no pre-existing mergeWith entry in simp_to_model's modification map.
established_facts.evidence: scripts/check_mergewith_blocker.py and the pinned Lean source snapshot.
established_facts.scope: Lean v4.32.0 DTreeMap internal tactic implementation.

established_facts.claim: The paired source state satisfies the static theorem-header and escape-hatch contract.
established_facts.scope: The four patched source files at the hashes emitted by check_upstream_bridge.py.

established_facts.claim: Stock-native overlay replay leaves the mergeWith model goal unchanged.
established_facts.scope: Lean v4.32.0 stock executable with artifacts/lean-overlay.

strategies.family: upstream model bridge plus native tactic replay
strategies.title: Add an upstream Lean Std list-model bridge and simp_to_model registration for Const.mergeWith, then replace Iris's bespoke TreeMap fold proof with a direct tactic proof.
strategies.mechanism: Model Const.mergeWith as a distinct-key-preserving list fold, register that model transformation with simp_to_model, and test the resulting imported metaprogram using a freshly built native Lean runtime.
strategies.hypothesis: Pinned Lean v4.32.0 with the proposed Const.mergeWith model bridge will make simp_to_model close the unchanged Iris getElem?_mergeWith' theorem without a private fold lemma.
strategies.discriminating_test: Build patched Lean Stage1 natively, compile experiments/SimpToModelMergeWith.lean, then run check_upstream_bridge.py with that executable before attempting the full Iris build.
strategies.blocker: The corrected native Stage1 job and consequent focused/full Iris receipts have not completed.
strategies.reopen_condition: If native Stage1 leaves mergeWith untransformed, retry this strategy only with an expression trace identifying the actual constant head or a materially different tactic-extension mechanism.

open_leads.description: Complete native Stage1 validation of the upstream mergeWith bridge.
open_leads.rationale: It is the only remaining test that directly distinguishes a valid tactic registration from the expected stock-runtime failure.
open_leads.next_experiment: Review lab-iris-lean-127-simp-to-model-ec16acc0a37a and inspect its built Lean invocation and checker output.

open_leads.description: If native registration fails, isolate whether the unresolved constant name is Const.mergeWith, its fully qualified implementation name, or mergeWith!.
open_leads.rationale: A single trace of the transformed expression can select the exact modifyMap entry without another full Iris build.
open_leads.next_experiment: Instrument a bounded local copy of simp_to_model's expression traversal in the standalone fixture.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Treating patched overlay oleans with the stock native executable as decisive validation.
ruled_out.scope: The imported simp_to_model mergeWith registration on Lean v4.32.0.
ruled_out.reason: The native runtime executed the old mapping and left mergeWith untransformed.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A demonstrated Lean invocation mode that interprets the changed imported metaprogram rather than dispatching to the stock native implementation.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Promoting the Iris-local private fold lemma as resolution of issue #127.
ruled_out.reason: It retains an implementation-specific fold proof and therefore does not satisfy the requested robustness mechanism.
ruled_out.evidence: The prior fallback diff summarized in findings/epoch-003-native-stage1-discriminator.md.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Maintainer confirmation that a private implementation-model lemma satisfies issue #127 despite the absence of direct mergeWith automation.

next_session.objective: Repair the failed pass and rerun.
next_session.first_action: Repair the failed pass and rerun.

failure_signatures.signature: Lean Stage1 invokes the configured compiler with --print-target-triple; a stale GCC cache produces 'cc: error: unrecognized command-line option --print-target-triple'.

reusable_assets.name: Lean mergeWith bridge patch
reusable_assets.use: Apply the list model, permutation lemmas, model bridge, and tactic registration.

reusable_assets.name: Iris direct tactic patch
reusable_assets.use: Replace the bespoke TreeMap helpers with the direct simp_to_model proof.

reusable_assets.name: Native fixture and checker
reusable_assets.use: Fail-fast validation of the imported tactic mapping and public Iris theorem.

constraints_learned.constraint: Overlay oleans cannot validate this changed imported metaprogram against the stock native runtime.
constraints_learned.evidence: .proof-experiments/20260723-063823-7333d5 exited 1 with the unchanged mergeWith model goal.

constraints_learned.constraint: The retained Stage1 directory must itself be reconfigured with bundled Clang.
constraints_learned.evidence: CMakeCache.txt named /usr/bin/cc and stdlib.make exported LEAN_CC=/usr/bin/cc despite an existing configure stamp.

decision_history.prediction: The paired patches would pass structural checks, while an overlay replay using the stock native runtime would leave mergeWith untransformed.
decision_history.observation: The structural checker passed. Stock-native overlay replay exited 1 at the predicted untransformed mergeWith model goal. Prior native retries failed operationally before reaching this proof.
decision_history.surprise: The retained Stage1 configure stamp preserved /usr/bin/cc, so changing only the outer CMake compiler would not regenerate stdlib.make.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Review lab-iris-lean-127-simp-to-model-ec16acc0a37a and require native_compile_checked true before full-build credit.

reduction_ledger.ambient_space: The single Iris TreeMap merge theorem plus the missing Lean Std Const.mergeWith model transformation.
reduction_ledger.represented_space_before: Three bespoke Iris fold/model helpers and a 130-line theorem-region diff, with no Std mergeWith tactic mapping.
reduction_ledger.eliminated_or_quotiented: The paired bridge reduces the Iris change to one local instance and one direct simp_to_model proof; native failures are filtered before the 259-job Iris build.
reduction_ledger.represented_space_after: An 8-addition, 122-deletion Iris diff and a 111-line Lean Std bridge, pending native validation.
reduction_ledger.reduction_factor: Iris theorem-region additions/deletions: 130 changed lines to 8 added proof lines; no global search-space factor applies.
reduction_ledger.coverage_scope: Pinned Lean v4.32.0 and iris-lean commit 3e2b759dd3e928f4a31535afd07ea571325f0b8a.
reduction_ledger.soundness_basis: git diff statistics, unchanged-header comparison, and the fail-closed structural checker.
reduction_ledger.remaining_unknown: Whether the newly built native tactic runtime accepts the registration and whether focused and full Iris builds pass.
reduction_ledger.next_bulk_elimination: Use the native fixture to reject the entire bridge design before any full Iris build if mergeWith remains unmodeled.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: Current Lean Std models many TreeMap operations but lacks a Const.mergeWith list model and tactic mapping. The patch supplies that missing semantic bridge; the Iris change then removes its private fold simulation.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: An unindexed or newly opened Lean PR could independently add mergeWith support; issue #127 currently has no linked development or assignee.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Search current Lean source for toListModel_mergeWith and the simp_to_model modify map, then compare the direct Iris theorem proof against its current bespoke implementation.
